LanguageData.SD_Letter_ChildhoodStarted_Text:
{0} opened her eyes, filled with confusion and curiosity.

"Who... who am I?"

The story begins. Designate a guardian to help the little girl find her place in the colony.
LanguageData.SD_Letter_YouthStarted_Text:
{0} has grown. Her eyes are no longer as naive as in childhood, yet still carry innocence.

She seems to understand more about the world, but cannot yet articulate her inner feelings.

Sync Rate: {1}%
Chaos Level: {2}%
LanguageData.SD_Letter_Omen_Positive:
Lately, {0} has been quietly following {1} around. She occasionally blushes and murmurs things.

"I-it's not like I want to be with you or anything! I'm just... used to it."

Her eyes betray an unmistakable attachment.
LanguageData.SD_Letter_Omen_Negative:
Lately, {0} has become quiet and withdrawn. She no longer approaches anyone, sometimes sitting alone in corners.

Colonists report seeing her eyes glow faintly in the dark.

Something dangerous seems to be stirring within her.
LanguageData.SD_Letter_RouteLocked_FatherBond_Text:
{0} has grown into a graceful young woman. She looks at {1} with warmth and devotion.

"Meeting you... was the luckiest thing in my life."

Her destiny moves toward the light.

Sync Rate: {2}% | Chaos Level: {3}%
LanguageData.SD_Letter_RouteLocked_DarkCorruption_Tit: {0}'s Heart is Being Consumed by Darkness
LanguageData.SD_Letter_RouteLocked_DarkCorruption_Tex:
{0}'s changes are becoming more obvious. Her smile turns cold, her words carry thorns.

"This world... is really boring."

The darkness within her keeps growing. It may be too late.

Sync Rate: {1}% | Chaos Level: {2}%
LanguageData.SD_Event_PositiveInteraction: {0} had a positive interaction with mentor. Sync +{1}
LanguageData.SD_GizmoSync_Tip: Depth of emotional bond with the colony.\nCurrent: {0}%
LanguageData.SD_GizmoAwaken_Tip: Self-awareness progress of the stellar core.\nCurrent: {0}%\nStage: {1}
LanguageData.SD_GizmoMaster_Tip: The designated guardian. When nearby, sync rate growth is multiplied by 1.5x. All colonist companionship contributes to sync rate. Current guardian: {0}
LanguageData.SD_FlightToggleDesc: Toggle flight mode on or off.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_Transform_Desc: Switch to witch form, witch factor growth accelerates.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_CancelTransform_Desc: Cancel witch form and return to normal state.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_SuppressDesc: Suppress the berserk witch and reset witch factor.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_Berserk: {0}'s witch factor is out of control! She has entered berserk state!
LanguageData.SD_Witch_CannotToggle_Berserk: Cannot toggle form while berserk. Suppression required!
LanguageData.SD_Witch_Suppressed: {0} has been suppressed. Witch factor reset.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_NoSuppressor: No available colonist to perform suppression.
